summary: Punchy audience recording captures a scorching 1990 show with blistering Scarlet Begonias, sweet Stella Blue and a fiery second‑set jam marathon.
review: The crowd‑sourced tape is praised as one of the better audience recordings – punchy, clear and full of the heat of that Bonner Springs night. Musically the concert shines, especially Brent’s soaring keyboards on Scarlet Begonias, a tight Victim→Foolish transition, a standout Just A Little Light into Scarlet→Fire, and sweet moments from Stella Blue and Sugar Magnolia.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 4‑5 stars and highlighted strong performances plus a high‑quality audience recording, giving the show a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as one of the better audience tapes – punchy, clear and ‘right there’ in the pit despite ambient heat noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A hot, energetic first set followed by a second‑set jam marathon; transitions like Victim→Foolish and Scarlet→Fire were highlighted as especially inspired.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Opened with Cold Rain & Snow and delivered his usual quirky banter; no specific performance criticism.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work was a major highlight, especially on Scarlet Begonias; noted as his last show before his passing.
